In the third yuga presided over by Indra the years are
named in order : Isvara, Bahudhanya, Pramatkin, Vikrama and Vrfa as
a result of Jupiter's transit. The first two years will be very auspi-
cious and will confer on the people the blessings of the Golden
Age. The year Pramathin will be very harmful, while the last two
will produce plenty of food but will cause diseases and fear.

Jupiter's Course VIII 93

The first year named Citrabhdnu of the fourth lustrum is con-
sidered to be the best, while the second year named Subhanu is of
moderate effect, as it produces diseases that are not fatal. The
third called Tarana gives abundant rains, and the fourth named
Pnrthiva makes people happy with abundant crops. The last one
called Vyaya is said to be auspicious, but it will be marked by the
activities of cupid (i.e. there will be many romances) as well as
by various festivities.
